case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CARE AND REHABILITATION VS. ELINOR HILL-COURTNEY

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. MATTER CONTINUED TO NOV-14-2019 AT 1:30 P.M. DEPT. 506. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $341.00 FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CARE AND REHABILITATION AS TO DEFENDANT HILL-COURTNEY, ELINOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-23-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO PLIANTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CARE AND REHABILATION, REPRESENTED BY TYLER HOLLINGSWORTH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ELINOR HILL-COURTNEY IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
